Fix: 

===>  Configuring for mindfocus-0.86.1
mv -f Makefile Makefile.bak
imake -DUseInstalled -I/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/config
make Makefiles
"Makefile", line 814: Missing dependency operator
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
*** Error code 1
How-To-Repeat: 
just build under latest stable/ports with XFree86-4 installed
